texto: When asked what gave her the strength and commitment to refuse segregation, (Rosa) Parks credited her mother and grandfather "for giving me the spirit of freedom... that I should not feel because of my race or color, inferior to any person. That I should do my very best to be a respectable person, to respect myself, to expect respect from others.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jeanne Theoharis sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “When asked what gave her the strength and commitment to refuse segregation, (Rosa) Parks credited…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, civil-rights, equal-rights, útil em momentos de inspiracao e equal-rights.
